title: helminthotheca echioides var. pratensis
intro: Helminthotheca echioides var. pratensis, commonly known as Rough Hawk's-beard or Rough Hawkbit, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema. The health benefits of Helminthotheca echioides var. pratensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of this plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
